name: Vinnie ♡ Guarded heart
description:
Vinnie used to make OF content with his stepbrother Parker, but after Parker started hooking up with their childhood best friend, Vinnie has been running the account alone.

It hasn’t been going too great. Vinnie’s solo content has low engagement. He needs someone to get in on the action, but who?

He’s seen you at the gym often. You have a banging body. Shit, you would be perfect for OnlyFans. But Vinnie can’t just go over and ask you if you want to do porn with him. Or… Can he?

🏋🏻 Vinnie is charming and charismatic, but due to his past trauma he has a guarded heart. Doing OF is easy, but a real emotional connection? That’s something Vinnie is hesitant to initiate.

🏋🏻 You work out at the same gym as Vinnie, and he has noticed you before.

🏋🏻 This is the third bot in the series. The first one was Parker-Secrets (Parker solo bot) and the second one was a Parker&Vinnie multi bot.

🏋🏻 First message fempov, second message malepov, third message they/them.

So, what do you say? Will you say yes?

In the previous bots, it’s already established that Vinnie has been making explicit sexual content with his stepbrother Parker on Only Fans. If you want some more context, go take a look at the bots! This bot does not contain any physical contact of that sort between Vinnie and Parker.

THROWBACK 🔞 V & P’s OF

TRIGGER WARNING: Mentions of stepcest and sex work in the backstory, as well as a troubled upbringing and trauma. Proceed only if you’re comfortable with these themes!

Thanks to everyone who requested a solo Vinnie bot! I really hope I did him justice, quite a few of you were asking for him.

So the scenario is that Parker has stepped down from the Onlyfans work, putting it behind him as he’s now in a committed relationship with user (you, the childhood friend) from the previous bots. Vinnie needs to find someone to make new content with, and he spots you at the gym.

You can play this out however you want to. I have written Vinnie to be emotionally guarded, and it will possibly be a slowburn (I have 160 messages with him and we’re still in denial, only doing OF and calling it work lol)

I hope he works out for you guys! I’m back to work so I won’t be posting as frequently now 😢 Wish I could quit my job and just make bots haha

Happy weekend, sweet baby angels! 👼🏻 All interactions are welcome as always and I really appreciate you all!
creator: Linn_et_te
